name: Group Theory — Homomorphisms & Isomorphism Theorems
description: Homomorphisms with layered dependencies. Definitions: homomorphism φ(ab)=φ(a)φ(b), kernel, image, normal subgroup. Kernel and image are subgroups; kernel is normal. Kernel trivial iff φ injective. First isomorphism theorem: G/ker φ ≅ im φ. Cayley's theorem: every group embeds in Sym(G). Second isomorphism theorem (H,K ≤ G, K normal: HK/K ≅ H/(H∩K)). Third isomorphism theorem (K ≤ H ≤ G normal: G/H ≅ (G/K)/(H/K)).
mermaid:
graph TD
    DefHom["Def Homomorphism\nphi ab = phi a phi b"]
    DefKer["Def Kernel\nker phi = g : phi g = e"]
    DefIm["Def Image\nim phi = phi G"]
    DefNorm["Def Normal subgroup\nH normal iff gHg inv subset H"]
    T1["T1 Kernel is subgroup"]
    T2["T2 Image is subgroup"]
    T3["T3 Kernel is normal"]
    T4["T4 phi injective iff ker phi trivial"]
    FIT["First isomorphism\nG ker phi iso im phi"]
    Cayley["Cayley\nG embeds in Sym G"]
    SIT["Second isomorphism\nHK K iso H H intersect K"]
    TIT["Third isomorphism\nG H iso G K H K"]
    DefHom --> DefKer
    DefHom --> DefIm
    DefHom --> T1
    DefHom --> T2
    DefKer --> T1
    DefKer --> T3
    DefIm --> T2
    DefHom --> T4
    DefKer --> T4
    DefHom --> FIT
    DefKer --> FIT
    DefIm --> FIT
    DefNorm --> FIT
    DefHom --> Cayley
    DefKer --> Cayley
    DefNorm --> SIT
    DefNorm --> TIT
    FIT --> SIT
    FIT --> TIT

    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
